title: Live and Let Die
why_this_song: Live and Let Die by Paul McCartney (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "You used to say live and let live"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "(You know you did)"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Makes you give in and cry"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "You used to say live and let live"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "But if this ever changin' world"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "live" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "live" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When you were young and your heart
Makes you give in and cry

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Live and Let Die" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Live and Let Die" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Live and Let Die" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Live and Let Die"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Paul McCartney one question about "Live and Let Die", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Paul McCartney sobre "Live and Let Die", o que seria e por quê?
